g.text: STAGE 3 · ANALYSE — against the in-memory bundle, which still has source

g.title: e_cli
g.text: own disk — memory bounded to one bundle

g.title: fanout
g.text: fan out — one job per submission

g.title: pfail
g.text: recorded on the job, not fatal
to the rest of the export

g.title: ddskip
g.text: re-sending an unchanged bundle is cheap
— this is what lets provgate treat its

g.title: unm
g.text: surfaced in its own triage view —

g.title: upa
g.text: ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING RETURNING id,
falling back to SELECT — avoids a write

g.title: ver
g.text: raw FOR UPDATE over the cohort's rows so two
workers cannot claim the same index

g.title: mv
g.text: staging key → final key, inside the

g.title: fail
g.text: blob orphan left for the retention

g.title: done
g.text: a retry of this whole pipeline produces
byte-identical flags and stats — tests assert it
